message:
fix(abi): delegate dlsym and dlclose to host libc for non-native handles

- Add host dlsym delegation for handles from host dlopen, forwarding
  symbol lookups via resolve_host_symbol_raw instead of returning
  ERR_INVALID_HANDLE
- Add host dlclose delegation for non-main-program handles from host
  dlopen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
